title: Sports Pool and Loto Canada Winding-Up Act
title_en: Sports Pool and Loto Canada Winding-Up Act
short_name: Sports Pool and Loto Canada Winding-U...
description: Sports Pool and Loto Canada Winding-Up Act (Sports Pool and Loto Canada Winding-U...). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Sports Pool and Loto Canada Winding-Up Act .

provisions.title: Definitions
provisions.content: 2 In this Act, Corporation Corporation means the Canadian Sports Pool Corporation established by section 3 of the Athletic Contests and Events Pools Act ; ( Société ) Her Majesty Her Majesty means Her Majesty in right of Canada; ( Sa Majesté ) Minister Minister means the Minister of Health. ( ministre )

provisions.title: Corporation ceases to exist
provisions.content: 3 The Corporation hereby ceases to exist.

provisions.title: Transfer of property and obligations of the Corporation
provisions.content: 4 (1) All rights and property held by or in the name of or in trust for the Corporation and all obligations and liabilities of the Corporation are deemed to be rights, property, obligations and liabilities of Her Majesty. (2) The Minister may do and perform all acts and things necessary for or incidental to closing out the affairs of the Corporation.

provisions.title: Repeal
provisions.content: 5 The Athletic Contests and Events Pools Act is repealed.

provisions.title: Transfer of property and obligations of Loto Canada Inc.
provisions.content: 6 (1) All rights and property held by or in the name of or in trust for Loto Canada Inc. and all obligations and liabilities of Loto Canada Inc. are deemed to be rights, property, obligations and liabilities of Her Majesty. (2) The Minister may do and perform all acts and things necessary for or incidental to procuring the dissolution and closing out of the affairs of Loto Canada Inc.

provisions.title: Legal proceedings
provisions.content: 7 (1) Any action, suit or other legal proceeding in respect of an obligation or liability incurred by the Corporation or Loto Canada Inc., or incurred by the Minister in closing out the affairs of the Corporation or Loto Canada Inc., may be brought or taken against Her Majesty in any court that would have had jurisdiction if the action, suit or other legal proceeding had been brought or taken against the Corporation or Loto Canada Inc., as the case may be. (2) Any action, suit or other legal proceeding pending in any court against the Corporation or Loto Canada Inc. may be continued against Her Majesty to the same extent as it could, but for the coming into force of this Act, have been continued against the Corporation or Loto Canada Inc., as the case may be. Her Majesty means Her Majesty in right of Canada; ( Sa Majesté )
